HomePage.tagline: Real estate exhibition platform for Armenia
HomePage.description: Discover new developments, builders and apartments across Armenia.

meta.title: ToonExpo — Find your next home
meta.description: Public catalog of new developments, apartments and builders in Armenia.

hero.title: Find the address that defines your next chapter.
hero.subtitle: Search homes, compare developments, and finance with partner banks — transparently, in one place.
hero.findProject: Find your next home with confidence

developments.title: New developments to watch.
developments.mapTitle: Every new development on one map.
developments.mapPlaceholder: Interactive map coming soon — browse projects by city for now.

explore.title: Browse by location
explore.description: Start with districts and cities represented in the live catalog.

exhibition.title: The ToonExpo experience
exhibition.description: Discover projects on the venue map, keep your permanent QR ready, and meet builders in person.

map.title: Venue map
map.body: Orient yourself and find builder booths quickly.

qr.title: Permanent QR
qr.body: One visitor identity for the whole exhibition.

scan.title: Builder scans
scan.body: Share interest instantly when a builder scans your code.

builders.title: Meet builders
builders.body: Connect catalog discovery with on-site conversations.

mortgage.title: Compare real offers from partner banks in under a minute.
mortgage.description: Live rates from twelve lenders, instant qualification estimates, and zero hidden fees — all integrated with the listing you're already viewing.
mortgage.cardBody: Transparent rates and terms from ToonExpo bank partners.

partners.title: Partners & banks
partners.description: Trusted participants supporting buyers across the exhibition journey.
partners.empty: Partners will appear here once published.

finalCta.title: Ready for your next home?
finalCta.description: Create a free buyer account, save favorites, and bring your permanent QR to the exhibition.

BuyPage.title: Homes for sale
BuyPage.empty: No homes match these filters yet.
BuyPage.saveSearchHint: Save this search to get email alerts when new homes match.

meta.title: Apartments for sale — ToonExpo
meta.description: Browse verified apartments with live availability, filters, and map view.

DevelopmentsPage.title: The skyline taking shape, with live unit availability.
DevelopmentsPage.subtitle: Track inventory, pricing, and construction progress on the most anticipated residential projects — directly from developers.

meta.title: New developments — ToonExpo
meta.description: Track inventory, pricing, and construction progress on residential projects from developers.

Footer.tagline: The marketplace for verified homes, new developments, and partner bank offers — built for buyers, brokers, and developers in one transparent platform.
Footer.trust: 100% verified listings · GDPR compliant · Data encrypted in transit
